text: Unopened fragrance and cosmetics items may be returned within 14 days with the original receipt and full packaging.
If a watch authenticity card is missing, staff must verify the serial number, contact the brand liaison, and document the handover before release.
If a traveller misses airport preorder collection, staff must cancel the airside hold, move the item to customer service review, and contact the traveller for next steps.
Opened cosmetics and skincare items are not eligible for return unless a product defect is confirmed by the boutique manager.
Luxury watch repair requests require the warranty card, proof of purchase, and a condition assessment form.
If premium packaging is damaged before collection, staff should replace the box where possible and record the packaging issue in the daily log.
